col_10: Fitment_Note

col_1: Body-to-chassis mount rubber kit (main tub/chassis rubbers)
col_10: Critical before tub refit; match sleeve stack heights to OEM mount points.
Needed for tub leveling at OEM mount locations.

col_4: 35 and 49 treated as same grommet procurement track
col_10: Confirm hole OD/ID sizes before final order quantity.
CityRacer note says one kit variant not compatible with diesel; verify engine family before purchase.

col_1: Gearbox / transfer mounts + top-cover bush service items
col_10: Confirm mount style against your transmission/transfer combination.
Do not order separately until the Ironman kit contents are counted; if missing, match spring eye ID, pin OD, sleeve length, and bush width.
Do not order separately until the Ironman kit contents are counted; if missing, match shackle/pin OD, hanger ID, sleeve length, and flange width.
Buy only if measurable play/cracking persists after inspection.

col_1: Brake flexible hose set (front + rear center)
col_10: If lifted height changes, verify hose length requirement before ordering OEM-length hoses.
Validate model year and hose end fittings before purchase.

col_1: Fuel hose + return hose + hose clamps kit
col_4: Rows grouped as one fuel-line rubber package
col_10: Use fuel-rated hose only (diesel compatible) and quality clamps.
Verify ID and total run length before ordering by meter.

col_1: Radiator/coolant hoses + thermostat gasket + radiator mount pads
col_4: Grouped cooling rubbers and gasket line items
col_10: Confirm engine/year-specific hose geometry and thermostat housing style.
Replace brittle caps and cracked small hoses during cooling refresh.
Confirm sender flange OD and strap pad dimensions before order.
Year-specific profile; choose by door type (early vs late).
Match glass style/year before purchase.
Variant differs by market/year; verify vent window type.
Replace cracked hangers during final exhaust alignment.

col_1: A/C barrier hoses + drain hoses + O-rings
col_10: Buy when HVAC layout is finalized; hose lengths depend on compressor/condenser placement.
Cosmetic/ergonomic item; verify pedal arm profile before order.
